void.string: <process description="modelName=com.landray.kmss.km.review.model.KmReviewTemplate&modelKey=reviewMainDoc&templateId=route-unmapped-formula-template&lbpmTmpId=route-unmapped-formula-lbpm" fdId="route-unmapped-formula-process"> <nodes> <startNode id="N1" name="Start"/> <reviewNode handlerIds="import java.util.List; List handlers = new java.util.ArrayList(); return handlers;" handlerNames="复杂公式审批人" handlerSelectType="formula" id="N2" name="Formula Review"/> <endNode id="N3" name="End"/> </nodes> <lines> <line endNodeId="N2" id="L1" startNodeId="N1"/> <line endNodeId="N3" id="L2" startNodeId="N2"/> </lines> </process>
